title: Trane Technologies Schedules Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, will host a conference call to discuss its second quarter 2023 financial results on Wednesday, August 2, 2023, at 10 a.m. ET. The company will issue its second quarter earnings release and earnings presentation in advance of the call; both will be available on the Trane Technologies website. A real-time, listen-only webcast of the conference call will be broadcast live over the internet. Individuals.
